comment: SDK configuration — update these values with your Launchpad environment details

authConfig.authorize_comment: Full path to the Launchpad OAuth 2.0 authorization endpoint (note: this is the cluster frontend URL, not the app server URL)
authConfig.token_comment: Full path to the Launchpad OAuth 2.0 token endpoint (proxied through dev server to avoid CORS)
authConfig.revoke_comment: Full path to the Launchpad OAuth 2.0 token revocation endpoint (proxied through dev server to avoid CORS)
authConfig.mashupClientSecret_comment: Required when the OAuth 2.0 client registration is configured as Confidential
authConfig.redirectUri_comment: Must match the redirect URI registered in your Launchpad OAuth 2.0 client — typically http://localhost:3502/ for main redirect flow
